promo_codes.description: 10% off eligible summer private charters on bookings of $500 or more.
15% off your first charter booking with no minimum spend.
$50 off full-day trips when you spend at least $400.

trips.title: 4-Hour Morning Private Reef Charter in Miami
trips.shortDescription: Private 4-hour morning reef trip targeting snapper and grouper off Miami Beach.
trips.fullDescription: Enjoy a 4-hour private morning reef charter departing from Miami Beach. Ideal for small groups looking for a relaxed outing targeting snapper, grouper, and other reef species. The captain provides all bait, tackle, and licenses, plus cold bottled water on board.
includedItems: Private use of boat and captain

trips.title: Shared 4-Hour Biscayne Bay Morning Trip
trips.shortDescription: Budget-friendly shared charter exploring Biscayne Bay for a variety of inshore species.
trips.fullDescription: Join a shared 4-hour morning charter on Biscayne Bay targeting sea trout, snapper, and other inshore species. Great for solo anglers or small groups on a budget. Basic tackle and licenses are included.

trips.title: Afternoon 4.5-Hour Shared Offshore Trip from San Diego
trips.shortDescription: Popular 4–5 hour shared offshore charter chasing rockfish and seasonal pelagics.
trips.fullDescription: Head offshore from San Diego on a 4.5-hour afternoon shared charter. Perfect for visitors who want to fish deeper waters without committing to a full day. Target rockfish, bonito, and seasonal pelagics depending on conditions. Rod rentals and licenses are included in the base price.
trips.departureAddress: 2380 Shelter Island Dr, San Diego, CA 92106

trips.title: Budget 4-Hour Afternoon Bay & Jetty Trip
trips.shortDescription: Affordable shared 4-hour afternoon bay and jetty charter, great for beginners.
trips.fullDescription: This 4-hour afternoon shared trip focuses on the San Diego Bay and jetty areas. Perfect for first-timers and families wanting an easy introduction to saltwater fishing. Light tackle and basic instruction are provided.
trips.departureAddress: 849 W Harbor Dr, San Diego, CA 92101

trips.title: Value Full-Day Tuna Hunt from Los Angeles
trips.shortDescription: 8–9 hour private tuna trip focused on value-minded anglers.
trips.fullDescription: Run offshore from Los Angeles on an 8–9 hour private charter targeting yellowfin, bluefin, and skipjack tuna depending on the season. This value-focused trip includes all essentials to get you on the fish while keeping overall cost down.
includedItems: Private use of boat and crew

trips.title: Premium Full-Day Tuna & Pelagics Charter
trips.shortDescription: Top-tier 9–10 hour private tuna expedition with premium tackle and hot meals.
trips.fullDescription: This premium full-day charter departs Los Angeles Harbor for offshore tuna grounds. Spend 9–10 hours chasing tuna and other pelagics with top-of-the-line gear, live bait, and onboard hot meals. Ideal for serious anglers looking for comfort and performance.
includedItems: Exclusive use of premium offshore vessel
Top-tier rods, reels, and braided line
notIncludedItems: Optional fuel surcharge for extended range

trips.title: Family-Friendly 3-Hour Morning Tampa Bay Trip
trips.shortDescription: Gentle 3-hour bay charter perfect for kids and first-time anglers.
trips.fullDescription: This family-focused 3-hour morning charter explores the calm waters of Tampa Bay. Target seatrout, ladyfish, and other easy-biting species while the captain provides simple instruction ideal for kids and beginners.

trips.title: Wheelchair-Accessible 6-Hour Inshore Charter
trips.shortDescription: Accessible 6-hour inshore trip targeting redfish and trout around Charleston.
trips.fullDescription: Fish the creeks and flats around Charleston on a 6-hour inshore charter aboard a wheelchair-accessible vessel. The boat features a wide, stable deck and boarding ramp for easier access. Target redfish, speckled trout, and flounder.

trips.title: Wheelchair-Accessible 6-Hour Reef & Wreck Trip
trips.shortDescription: Enhanced 6-hour accessible charter to nearshore reefs and wrecks.
trips.fullDescription: This 6-hour trip takes you to Charleston's nearshore reefs and wrecks aboard a fully wheelchair-accessible boat. Enjoy upgraded seating, shade, and a mate on board to assist with tackle and fish handling.

trips.title: 6–8 Hour Private Offshore Charter from Key West
trips.shortDescription: Versatile 6–8 hour offshore private charter for mahi, tuna, and sailfish.
trips.fullDescription: Depart from Key West on a private 6–8 hour offshore charter. Depending on conditions and your preferences, target mahi-mahi, blackfin tuna, sailfish, and more. Ideal for groups wanting a longer day on blue water without committing to a marathon.
notIncludedItems: Fish cleaning (available for a small fee)

trips.title: Full-Day Offshore Adventure from Galveston
trips.shortDescription: 8–10 hour offshore trip to deep Gulf of Mexico waters.
trips.fullDescription: Run offshore from Galveston for a full day chasing red snapper (in season), kingfish, and other Gulf of Mexico species. This trip is designed for anglers seeking a classic offshore adventure.

trips.title: Shilshole Bay 4-Hour Inshore Trip
trips.shortDescription: Scenic inshore trip near Shilshole Bay Marina targeting bottom fish and salmon (seasonal).
trips.fullDescription: Depart from Shilshole Bay Marina for a relaxed 4-hour inshore charter. Fish the local structure for bottom fish and, when in season, coho and pink salmon. Great for casual anglers and visitors who want to see the city from the water.

trips.title: 6-Hour Puget Sound Charter from Shilshole
trips.shortDescription: Highly rated 6-hour charter from Shilshole Bay Marina for salmon and lingcod.
trips.fullDescription: This 6-hour trip departs Shilshole Bay Marina and explores Central and Northern Puget Sound for salmon, lingcod, and other local favorites. With flexible departure times and experienced local crew, it’s a favorite among repeat guests.

trips.title: Evening 3-Hour Fishing & Sightseeing from Shilshole
trips.shortDescription: Combo fishing and sightseeing cruise with sunset views over the Olympics.
trips.fullDescription: Enjoy an easy 3-hour evening outing from Shilshole Bay Marina that combines light fishing with scenic cruising. Watch the sunset over the Olympic Mountains while trying for bottom fish and seasonal salmon close to shore.

trips.title: 4-Hour Sunset Fishing Charter in Honolulu
trips.shortDescription: Top-rated 4-hour private sunset trip with skyline and Diamond Head views.
trips.fullDescription: Combine world-class scenery with light tackle fishing on this 4-hour private sunset charter. Depart Kewalo Basin and work the nearshore reefs while the sun sets behind the Honolulu skyline and Diamond Head.
includedItems: Photos taken by crew on your device

trips.title: Shared 3.5-Hour Honolulu Sunset Bottom Fishing
trips.shortDescription: Fun shared sunset fishing trip ideal for beginners and casual anglers.
trips.fullDescription: Join a shared 3.5-hour bottom fishing trip out of Honolulu timed perfectly for sunset. The crew provides all gear and simple instruction, making this a great choice for first-timers.

trip_add_ons.name: Bait & Tackle Upgrade
trip_add_ons.description: Upgrade to premium bait and fluorocarbon leaders for improved inshore performance.

trip_add_ons.name: Photo Package
trip_add_ons.description: Digital photo package with 20+ edited images of your trip delivered via download link.

trip_add_ons.name: Cooler of Soft Drinks
trip_add_ons.description: Pre-stocked cooler with assorted sodas and bottled water for up to 5 guests.

trip_add_ons.name: GoPro Video Package
trip_add_ons.description: Mounted GoPro cameras record your catches; includes edited highlight reel.

trip_add_ons.name: Catering Lunch
trip_add_ons.description: Boxed lunches with sandwiches, chips, and fruit for up to 6 guests.

trip_add_ons.name: Fish Mount Service Deposit
trip_add_ons.description: Reserve a taxidermy mount of your trophy catch with a deposit applied to final cost.

trip_add_ons.name: Live Bait Upgrade
trip_add_ons.description: Extra live bait for extended offshore trolling and kite fishing.

trip_add_ons.name: Snorkel Gear Add-On
trip_add_ons.description: Masks, snorkels, and fins for up to 4 guests to enjoy a mid-trip swim stop.

trip_add_ons.name: Kids Beginner Pack
trip_add_ons.description: Includes kid-friendly rods, small tackle box, and a souvenir certificate for each child.

trip_add_ons.name: Extra Hour on the Water
trip_add_ons.description: Extend your family trip by one additional hour of fishing.

trip_add_ons.name: Hotel Pickup - Miami Beach
trip_add_ons.description: Round-trip ground transportation from most Miami Beach hotels to the marina.

trip_add_ons.name: Catch-and-Cook Reservation
trip_add_ons.description: Reservation at partner restaurant that will cook your catch (cooking fee paid at restaurant).

trip_add_ons.name: Rod Upgrade Package
trip_add_ons.description: Premium rod and reel setup for improved sensitivity and comfort.

trip_add_ons.name: Fish Cleaning Service
trip_add_ons.description: Have your catch filleted and bagged on ice at the dock.

trip_add_ons.name: Coffee & Pastry Breakfast
trip_add_ons.description: Fresh coffee and pastries for your group on morning departures.

trip_add_ons.name: Fish Vacuum Packing
trip_add_ons.description: Vacuum sealing of your fillets for easier transport and freezing.

trip_add_ons.name: Professional Photo Package
trip_add_ons.description: Photographer on board capturing candid and posed shots at sunset.

trip_add_ons.name: Lei Greeting at Dock
trip_add_ons.description: Traditional fresh-flower lei greeting for each guest upon arrival.
